steady_flame: My partner knows exactly what I'm thinking without me saying it.
I prefer small, daily kindnesses over big, rare surprises.
We have a 'secret language' of inside jokes.
I trust my partner with the version of me that is tired and grumpy.
Stability is more romantic to me than passion.
My partner is the first person I want to tell good news to.
I feel most loved when we are doing absolutely nothing together.
electric_spark: I love it when my partner challenges me to do something new.
Our best moments are often the most unplanned ones.
I need a lot of physical affection to feel connected.
I get bored if we do the same thing every weekend.
I'm usually the one who initiates 'date night'.
I feel most connected when we're out in the world together.
Passion is more important to me than predictability.
deep_current: I need deep conversations to feel truly connected.
My partner knows things about me that nobody else does.
I often feel things quite intensely but wait to speak them.
I value emotional intelligence above almost everything else.
I'm a very loyal partner, even when things are tough.
I feel most loved when my partner listens without trying to fix me.
Depth is more romantic to me than surface-level excitement.
shifting_tide: I'm not afraid to have the hard conversations in our relationship.
I think we've both changed a lot since we first met.
I value honesty over 'keeping the peace'.
I'm always looking for ways we can grow as a couple.
I'm usually the one who notices when something is 'off'.
I feel most connected when we've just resolved a difficult issue.
Growth is the most romantic thing to me.
